flow.description: The flow used in Automatic Document Verification - using TruNarrative API.
flow.name: AutoDocVerify

properties.log-message: Unable to send message to TagManager API automatically for user ${external_user_id} with flag: ${flag}
TN AUTODOC STAGE 3 SUCCESSFUL ${external_user_id}, status=${status}, action=${action}

properties.verifyCustomer:
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE 
WHERE status='ACCEPTED' 
AND statusCode='COMPLETE'
AND decision='ACCEPT'

labels.label: Do we need to add some tag? Or what to do?

properties.declineCustomer:
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE 
WHERE status='DECLINE' 
AND statusCode='COMPLETE'
AND decision='DECLINE'
